channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The First Proper ‘Ghost in the Shell’ Trailer Is a ’90s Anime Fever Dream
item.description: Science Saru finally showed off real footage for 'The Ghost in the Shell,' and it looks beautiful in motion as it does in stills.

item.title: A classic Zelda-style adventure, but a lot more cozy
item.description: The Legend of Zelda games are grand adventures, but they can also be very comforting, with quaint villages to explore and warm landscapes to take in. Under The Island takes that idea a step further. It still offers the sense of exploration and puzzle-solving that makes Zelda games so satisfying, but it also takes place […]

item.title: Here’s what Verge readers are buying during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
item.description: We have a pretty good understanding of which deals Verge readers will gravitate toward. After all, what products and services resonate with our audience — and the quality of the deal itself — are what help us determine what to cover on any given day. And yet, we never know for sure how people will […]

item.title: Let’s take a look at the retro tech making a comeback
item.description: Boomboxes, instant cameras, and even landlines are making a comeback. Here are the coolest retro-inspired devices available.

item.title: Wonder Man season 2: everything we know so far about the Marvel TV show's return on Disney+
item.description: Wonder Man season 2 is in the works at Marvel Studios — here's what we know about it so far.

item.title: J’ai testé le VELLO DE VILLE Loady, le vélo cargo électrique le plus personnalisable du marché
item.description: VELO DE VILLE fête ses 60 ans cette année. Sa force : la personnalisation de ses modèles, du choix du moteur au choix de la couleur en passant par la selle et les freins. Avec le LOADY, VELO DE VILLE signe son entrée sur le marché très concurrentiel du vélo cargo. Que vaut ce LOADY face à la concurrence ? La réponse dans ce test complet.

item.title: Dreame Matrix10 Ultra : ce robot aspirateur-laveur qui change lui-même ses serpillières voit son prix passer sous les 1 100 €
item.description: Avec ses patins interchangeables, sa grande puissance et sa navigation intelligente, le Dreame Matrix10 Ultra ne manque clairement pas d'atouts. En ce moment, Boulanger le propose à 1 079 euros au lieu de 1 299 euros.

item.title: 'A huge amount of network traffic now comes from machines talking to other machines': what rising data demand means for networks
item.description: With AI reshaping operations, a telecom expert says networks and data centers are growing increasingly interconnected.

item.title: YouTuber Resolves Fraternal Disagreement With Excavator and Hilariously Large Sword
Why OpenAI killed Sora
item.description: On Tuesday morning, everything was business as usual at OpenAI. By the end of the day, the company had announced that it would scrap its video-generation app, Sora, and reverse plans for video generation inside ChatGPT; it would wind down a $1 billion Disney deal; it would shuffle the role of a high-level executive; and […]

item.title: The must-have app for frequent flyers
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 121, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, good luck in the Elite Eight, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) This week, I've been reading about Will Wright and sync music and the […]

item.title: From Moon hotels to cattle herding: 8 startups investors chased at YC Demo Day
item.description: We polled nearly a dozen VCs to find out which W26 startups are the sought after in the batch.

item.title: 'A complete disaster': The 11 worst Apple gadgets of the past 50 years, according to you
item.description: We asked you to vote on the worst gadget Apple has ever made in its 50-year history — here are the results.

item.title: What Is the Best Garmin Watch Right Now? (2026)
item.description: We tested Garmin’s GPS-enabled fitness trackers and found the perfect picks for casual hikers, backcountry skiers, and more.

item.title: There's another sign that the Trump phone might actually be launching — though it's not clear when
item.description: The Trump Phone has actually passed through FCC clearance, which means it might be on the way.

item.title: The Best Pixel 10 Cases and Accessories (2026): We’ve Tested Dozens
item.description: Slap a case on your shiny new Pixel, whether you have the Pixel 10a, Pixel 10, or Pixel 10 Pro XL. We also have recommendations for Qi2 chargers and other accessories.
